settings.menu_text: Ethiopian single-origins and house blends, brewed to order.
settings.about_text: Hasna's Coffee brings the Ethiopian coffee ceremony to Austin. Every cup tells the story of its origin — roasted with care, served with love.

settings.title: Sustainably Sourced
settings.text: Partnering directly with farmers for fair trade and ethical practices.

settings.title: Single Origin
settings.text: Beans from renowned growing regions across 15+ countries.

settings.title: Award Winning
settings.text: Recognized by the Specialty Coffee Association for quality.

settings.title: Source
settings.text: We travel to the world's finest growing regions, building lasting relationships with farmers who share our dedication to quality.

settings.title: Roast
settings.text: Small-batch roasting in our facility, tailored to each bean's origin and characteristics to unlock its full potential.

settings.title: Deliver
settings.text: Your order is packaged and shipped within 24 hours of roasting — arriving at peak freshness, ready to brew.

settings.title: Enjoy
settings.text: Brew with your preferred method and savor the complexity, aroma, and character of truly exceptional coffee.

settings.quote: Absolutely incredible coffee. The Ethiopian single origin changed how I think about my morning brew.
I've tried dozens of specialty coffee roasters, and this is hands down the best. The freshness is unmatched.
The subscription is a game changer. Fresh beans every two weeks and the flavor profiles are always on point.
